prompt: Create a clean printable sheet of nine identical ID photo portraits arranged in a 3 by 3 grid on a white background. Each portrait shows the same adult woman from the chest up, centered and facing forward, with long light brown/blonde hair worn down, wearing a dark navy business blazer over a white V-neck blouse. Use neutral passport-photo lighting, a plain white studio backdrop, symmetrical composition, realistic photographic style, and consistent scale across all copies. The face must be anonymized/covered in every copy by a smooth vertical rectangular blur block in a natural skin-tone color, placed over the full face area from forehead to chin while leaving hair, neck, ears, blazer, and blouse visible. The sheet contains exactly 9 portraits: top-left, top-center, top-right, middle-left, middle-center, middle-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, and bottom-right. Keep generous white gutters between portraits, crop each photo just below the shoulders, no text, no borders, no watermark, no decorative elements. Use adult woman, light brown blonde, dark navy blazer and white V-neck blouse, 3 by 3, nine portraits, and smooth skin-tone rectangular blur over the face.
